intended_use_full: The Swoop® Portable MR Imaging Systems' is a bedside magnetic resonance imaging device for producing images that display the internal structure of the head where full diagnostic examination is not clinically practical. When interpreted by a trained physician, these images provide information that can be useful in detecting a diagnosis.
